title: DiscordSRVOAuth
description: Allow players to link their Discord account via Discord OAuth2
body:
# Usage 1. Download the plugin 2. Upload the plugin to your Minecraft Server (make sure it has [DiscordSRV](https://modrinth.com/plugin/discordsrv)) 3. Make sure the port is open and not used 4. Make sure the URL is valid ## Setting up Discord values Everything is being done within Discord application's settings > OAuth2 ### Values Copy over the Client ID & Client Secret to the config. Then you would need to configure Redirects. It must be what you have in the config. An example is shown below ![](https://github.com/PadowYT2/DiscordSRVOAuth/blob/main/assets/redirects.png?raw=true) ## Setting up HTTPS Please see at [GitHub README](https://github.com/PadowYT2/DiscordSRVOAuth#setting-up-https)
bStats [![](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/DiscordSRVOAuth.svg)](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/DiscordSRVOAuth)
